title: Kids Dino Blaster Gun Toy, Soft Safe Darts, Target, Dinosaur, Jurassic Activity
features: Thrilling Dinosaur Adventure: Unleash your inner palaeontologist with this exciting Dino Blaster gun toy set, featuring a ferocious dinosaur design.
Safe and Soft Darts: The set includes three soft foam darts, ensuring safe and enjoyable play for kids.
Interactive Target: Challenge your aiming skills by hitting the included target, adding an extra layer of fun and excitement.
Imaginative Play: Encourage imaginative and active play as kids immerse themselves in a prehistoric world of discovery.
Compact and Portable: With its compact size, this Dino Blaster toy is perfect for indoor and outdoor adventures, fostering creativity and physical activity.
description: Product description Unleash your child's inner explorer with this thrilling Dino Blaster Gun Toy! This set combines the excitement of a blaster with the wonder of prehistoric creatures. The blaster is designed as a fierce dinosaur, adding an extra touch of adventure to playtime. Load the soft, safe darts into the blaster and take aim at the included target for hours of engaging fun. With its vibrant colours and engaging design, this toy is sure to ignite your little one's imagination and encourage active play. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use, the Dino Blaster Gun Toy is a fantastic addition to any child's toy collection. Measuring approximately 30 cm in length, it's the perfect size for small hands to grip and aim with ease. Encourage your youngster's development through imaginative role-play and target practice with this captivating Jurassic-themed activity set. Safety Warning Not Suitable for Children Under 3
